name: @cloudflare/sandbox-devin-outpost-example
description: Devin Outposts orchestrator on Cloudflare Workers + Durable Object Containers.

DEVIN_POOL_ID.description: The Devin Outposts pool ID this Worker should serve.

DEVIN_API_TOKEN.description: A Devin Enterprise API token with the `account.outposts.orchestrator` scope.
